audit_result.proof_trace: Deduplication uses blockRootHex (hash of full BeaconBlockHeader including bodyRoot) instead of (slot, proposer_index) as spec requires. This allows equivocating proposers to have multiple data column sidecars accepted for the same (slot, proposer_index, column_index) tuple if they produce blocks with different bodies.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Malicious proposer creates two blocks A and B at same slot with different bodies (different bodyRoot), producing valid signatures and data column sidecars for column index 0 for both. Both sidecars pass validation and are cached separately (different blockRootHex values), violating spec requirement to accept only the first sidecar for tuple (slot, proposer_index, index).

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-012.text: Deduplication key (slot, proposer_index, sidecar.index) must prevent duplicate acceptance.
PROP-6a4369e9-inv-012.assertion: forall s1,s2: accepted(s1) && accepted(s2) && same_dedup_key(s1,s2) => s1 == s2
